calendar.matters:
MOTION Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc's motion to compel responses to post-judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to special interrogatories and request for production within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
